# Resume Builder

> A free, browser-based tool that helps job seekers create professional, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes. Users can upload an existing PDF or DOCX resume to extract their details, or build a new resume from scratch using a guided editor, then download a polished PDF.

## Product

Resume Builder is a client-side single-page application built with Angular. No account or sign-in is required. All data stays in the browser.

## Public Routes

- [Home](/) — Landing page. Explains the product and lets users choose to upload an existing resume or start fresh.
- [Upload](/upload) — Upload a PDF or DOCX resume for automatic content extraction.
- [Builder](/builder) — Guided resume editor. Fill in sections: contact info, summary, work experience, education, and skills.
- [Preview](/preview) — Live-rendered resume preview with PDF download.

## Target Audience

Job seekers who want a quick, private, and polished resume without creating an account or paying for a subscription.

## Key Facts

- Free to use, no sign-in required
- Works entirely in the browser — no data is sent to a server
- Supports PDF and DOCX upload for content extraction
- Produces ATS-compatible PDF output
